name: group_inactive_warning

metadata.description: Warning email sent to group admins when a group approaches inactivity auto-disable.
notes: Sent to system users with manage_groups or groups permission.

subject_template: Group '{{ group_name }}' will be disabled in {{ days_until_disable }} days
text_template:
Hello,

The group "{{ group_name }}" (ID: {{ group_id }}) has been inactive for over {{ inactive_days }} days. It will be automatically disabled in {{ days_until_disable }} days.

If this group is still needed, ensure it has activity before the deadline.

If this group is no longer needed, no action is required.
html_template:
Group Inactivity Warning

The group {{ group_name }} (ID: {{ group_id }}) has been inactive for over {{ inactive_days }} days and will be automatically disabled in {{ days_until_disable }} days.

If this group is still needed, ensure it has activity before the deadline.

If this group is no longer needed, no action is required.

Sent by Django-MOJO
